subject: (Yoed Nir) bowery wine co gigs
body:
FYI....

-----Original Message-----
From: Yoed NIr [mailto:yoednir@gmail.com] 
Sent: Tuesday, April 01, 2008 2:13 PM
To: Chris Apostle
Subject: Re: new music track(Yoed Nir)

Hey chris,
I just met chris it was very nice ,my first playing will be on the 4/12
saturday at brunch time(from 12:00 noon, until 16:00) I will play alone,
it
will be very nice,
Thanks a lot
Y
Ps
How much do you think I should ask for it?


Sent via BlackBerry from T-Mobile
